'''Jivis''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] hunter who participated in a [[Morodin/Legends|Morodin]] safari on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]] with [[Hav]].

==Biography==
Jivis, a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] a [[Gender/Legends|male]], was a wealthy businessbeing. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], he traveled to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]] to partake in a [[Morodin/Legends|Morodin]]-hunting safari alongside a fellow Duros, [[Hav]].<ref name="FC" />

==Personality and traits==
Jivis was a wealthy Duros who was bored and looking for excitement, leading to him signing up for a hunting expedition. Despite his wealth, Jivis complained that he had to work for his excitement.<ref name="FC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jivis first appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s ''[[First Contact]]'', which was published in [[1994]]'s [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1]] by [[West End Games]]. ''First Contact'' was subsequently reprinted in ''[[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]]'', ''[[Tales from the Empire]]'', and on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']].

==Appearances==
